# AI Code Review Bot - 腾讯云SCF部署配置

component: scf
name: ai-code-review-bot
org: invisible-gold
app: ai-code-review-bot
stage: prod

inputs:
  name: ai-code-review-bot
  src:
    src: ./package
    exclude:
      - .env
  runtime: Python3.9
  handler: index.main_handler
  timeout: 30
  memorySize: 256
  namespace: default
  description: AI Code Review Bot - 自动审查GitHub PR
  environment:
    variables:
      CODE_REVIEW_GITHUB_APP_ID: placeholder
      CODE_REVIEW_AI_API_KEY: placeholder
      CODE_REVIEW_AI_MODEL: glm-4
      CODE_REVIEW_REVIEW_LANGUAGE: zh-CN
  events:
    - apigw:
        name: ai-code-review-bot-api
        parameters:
          protocols:
            - https
          serviceName: ai-code-review-bot
          description: AI Code Review Bot API Gateway
          environment: release
          endpoints:
            - path: /webhook
              method: POST
              description: GitHub Webhook接收端点
            - path: /health
              method: GET
              description: 健康检查端点
